# [skill] Strengthen tech-debt-radar to detect unbounded-list APIs over growing data structures

## Context

Session `62d6f155` (2026-04-19) identified a recurring pattern: as a data structure grows (concept ontology, class hierarchy, session memory), unbounded-list APIs ("return everything") accumulate quietly. The `get_class_hierarchy` bloat in session `74cfa05e` (2026-01-08) and the ConceptService unbounded-APIs surfaced in session `62d6f155` (2026-04-19, parent ticket #10080) are the same class of bug in different subsystems.

`tech-debt-radar`'s current remit is proactive RAG sweeps across historical issues and memory sessions (per session `01c73aa2`, 2026-04-15). It detects *archaeology* — debt that already exists. It does not currently detect the *pattern* — *"growing data structure with flat unbounded API surface"* — which is a forecastable failure mode.

## Proposed Strengthening

Extend `.agent/skills/tech-debt-radar/references/*.md` to add an explicit detection class:

**Unbounded-List API Detection**

When sweeping the codebase, flag any `ai/services/*.mjs` or `ai/mcp/server/*/services/*.mjs` method that:

1. Has a name matching `findAll*`, `getAll*`, `list*`, `get*s` (plural returns)
2. AND does not accept a `limit` / `maxResults` / `pageSize` parameter
3. AND returns a collection type (Array, Map, Set) in its JSDoc

Report as `[UNBOUNDED_API_RISK]` with the specific method + suggested remediation (add `limit` parameter with documented default + max, per the Gold Standard established in `get_class_hierarchy`'s `root` param and ConceptService's bounded query layer from #10080).

## Cross-Reference Additions

Cross-link from `ticket-intake`'s §1.2 Semantic Blast-Radius Sweep — when an incoming ticket adds methods to a data-structure-holding service, the blast radius check should surface whether the new method joins the unbounded-API surface.

## Falsifiable Test of Success

A future session adding a new `findAll*` / `getAll*` method to any SDK service gets `[UNBOUNDED_API_RISK]` flagged during tech-debt-radar invocation (observable in `tech-debt-radar` skill output during ticket-intake or pr-review).

## Scope

Purely additive — no existing tech-debt-radar detection logic changes. ~20–40 line diff across `tech-debt-radar/references/*.md`.

## Related

- Parent ticket: #10080 (ConceptService bounded query layer — ships the canonical example this strengthening codifies)
- `tech-debt-radar` SKILL.md + references/
